ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Specially Appearing Respondents Patrick Cahill, John Sullivan, And The Northern Trust Company Of Delaware'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Petition Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Or Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens (Added For The Posting Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Mar-02-2023 Off Calendar

Specially Appearing Respondents Patrick Cahill, John Sullivan, And The Northern Trust Company Of Delaware'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Petition Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Or Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Freeland appeared by zoom for Sarah Cahill (petitioner).
Drew Davis appeared in person and Elizabeth Dorsi appeared by zoom for specially appearing respondent Patrick Cahill.
Steven Platt appeared in person for Northern Trust Co. of Delaware and for John Sullivan.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions in response to the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Davis presented a proposed order indicating that they made some modifications to order. Counsel is instructed to e-mail the proposed in the form of a word document to the staff attorney. At the request of the parties, the Petition for Order for Accounting, and the Petition for 1) Order Confirming and Directing Termination of Trust, etc. are continued from March 18, 2023 to April 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chan. Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, sheilapham28@gmail.com
